name: DEUTZ AG
description: DEUTZ AG is a German engine manufacturer headquartered in Cologne, Germany. Founded in 1864, the company specializes in the development, production, and distribution of diesel, gas, and electric engines for a wide range of applications, including construction equipment, agricultural machinery, material handling equipment, stationary systems, commercial vehicles, and rail vehicles. DEUTZ also provides comprehensive maintenance and service solutions to support its global customer base.
